name: workbench
description: Workbench — an AI-orchestrated way of working that grows with your product: a maturity ladder (Solo/Pair/Crew/Fleet), file-based task lifecycle, session/compaction continuity, multi-session coordination, brainstorm->spec->plan discipline, a context backbone, and Telegram remote control.

plugins.name: workbench
plugins.description: Scaffolds and maintains a complete AI-orchestrated way of working that grows with your product. Slash commands under /workbench:*.
